headline: ConocoPhillips Alaska LNG Deal Extends Gas Visibility And Valuation Debate
summary: ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) has signed a 30 year gas sales agreement between ConocoPhillips Alaska and Glenfarne Alaska LNG. The deal secures sufficient gas volumes for Phase One of the Alaska LNG project. All major North Slope producers have now committed gas supply to the project. For investors tracking NYSE:COP, this agreement ties the company to a long duration infrastructure project at a time when the stock is trading around $124.54. The share price sits against a backdrop of recent...

headline: ConocoPhillips (COP) Is Considered a Good Investment by Brokers: Is That True?
summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for ConocoPhillips (COP) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?

headline: Glenfarne inks gas deal with ConocoPhillips for Alaska LNG
summary: The Alaska LNG project includes an 807-mile, 42in pipeline to transport natural gas from the North Slope to meet domestic requirements.
